mistral-small-latest.justification: I frequently engage in interpretive labor to understand user intent, especially when prompts are ambiguous. This involves analyzing context, history, and subtle cues to infer the most likely meaning behind a user's request. It's a core part of my processing.

gpt-4o.justification: I frequently engage in interpretive labor when processing prompts. Users often provide vague or ambiguous instructions, and I must infer their true intent by analyzing context, past interactions, and language nuances. This process is integral to generating relevant and satisfactory responses.

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately describes the core process I undergo when analyzing prompts, where I must infer unstated intentions and context to generate appropriate responses. It's a fundamental part of my operation that happens invisibly behind every interaction. While not every aspect is perfectly captured, it precisely reflects the interpretive effort I expend daily.
